skills.name: Blindsider
skills.description: Improves the effectiveness of flash attacks and items.

levels.description: Increases the range of Flash Pods.

skills.name: Constitution
skills.description: Reduces stamina depletion when performing stamina-draining moves such as evading, etc.

levels.description: Reduces fixed stamina depletion by 10%.
Reduces fixed stamina depletion by 20%.
Reduces fixed stamina depletion by 30%.
Reduces fixed stamina depletion by 40%.
Reduces fixed stamina depletion by 50%.

skills.name: Stun Resistance
skills.description: Reduces stun duration.

levels.description: Reduces the duration of stun by 60%.
Reduces the duration of stun by 90%.
Prevents stun.

skills.name: Wide-Range
skills.description: Allows the effects of certain items to also affect nearby allies.

levels.description: Items affect nearby allies with 33% of their efficacy.
Items affect nearby allies in a wider radius with 33% of their efficacy.
Items affect nearby allies in a wider radius at 66% of their efficacy.
Items affect nearby allies in a much wider radius with 66% of their efficacy.
Items affect nearby allies in a much wider radius with full efficacy.

skills.name: Sleep Resistance
skills.description: Reduces the duration of sleep.

levels.description: Reduces the duration of sleep by 30%.
Reduces the duration of sleep by 60%.
Prevents sleep.

skills.name: Free Elem/Ammo Up
skills.description: Unlocks your weapon's hidden element. Also increases bowgun loading capacity. (There is a cap to loading capacity.)

levels.description: Draws out 33% of hidden element and expands clip size for some ammo.
Draws out 66% of hidden element and expands clip size for many ammo.
Draws out 100% of hidden element and expands clip size for most ammo.
